g.onclick: sendPrompt('What files live in the Healthcare project root?')
sendPrompt('What does Git track in an MLOps project?')
sendPrompt('What does DVC track in an MLOps project?')
sendPrompt('What is DVC remote storage and why use S3?')
sendPrompt('What goes to GitHub in an MLOps project?')

g.text: S3 stores the actual data — never in Git
